title: osmanthus heterophyllus var. acutus
intro: Osmanthus heterophyllus var. acutus, also known as the osmanthus plant or fragrant tea olive, is a fragrant and evergreen shrub native to China and Japan. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. In herbal medicine, the leaves and flowers of Osmanthus heterophyllus var. acutus are used to make tea, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide numerous health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and immune-boosting effects. The herbal preparations of Osmanthus heterophyllus var. acutus are traditionally used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine.
